segmentCard.className: box-border flex aspect-square min-h-[var(--memory-studio-segment-card-min-size)] w-full min-w-[var(--memory-studio-segment-card-min-size)] flex-col justify-between overflow-hidden rounded-panels p-12 transition-colors duration-150 group-focus-visible:ring-2 group-focus-visible:ring-signal-blue group-focus-visible:ring-offset-2 group-focus-visible:ring-offset-eggshell bg-chalk
